title: Grizzled Squirrel Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Grizzled Squirrel Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Grizzled Squirrel Wildlife Sanctuary, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Grizzled Squirrel Wildlife Sanctuary (GSWS), also known as Srivilliputhur Wildlife Sanctuary, was established in 1988 to protect the Near threatened grizzled giant squirrel (Ra
overview.description: The Grizzled Squirrel Wildlife Sanctuary (GSWS), also known as Srivilliputhur Wildlife Sanctuary, was established in 1988 to protect the Near threatened grizzled giant squirrel (Ratufa macroura). Occupying an area of 485.2 km2, it is bordered on the southwest by the Periyar Tiger Reserve and is one of the best preserved forests south of the Palghat Gap. The sanctuary covers 485 km2 (187 sq mi) in western Tamil Nadu, South India in the eastern water-shed of the Western Ghats and consists of high hills and valleys, with a number of peaks reaching up to 2,019 m (6,624 ft).

topPlaces.name: Edaganathar temple
topPlaces.description: Edaganathar Temple (ஏடகநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Thiruvedagam, a village in Madurai district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The temple is located on the banks of Vaigai River.

topPlaces.name: Kansapuram
topPlaces.description: Kansapuram is a village in the foothills of the Western Ghats in Virudhunagar District, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 2 kilometres south of Koomapatti and 7 kilometres west of Watrap.

topPlaces.name: Koomapatti
topPlaces.description: Koomapatti or Koomapatty is a village in Watrap taluk of Virudhunagar district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located in the foothills of the Western Ghats, 5 kilometres (3.1 mi) west of Vathirairuppu.

topPlaces.name: Mamsapuram
topPlaces.description: Mamsapuram is a town located in Srivilliputhur Taluk and comes under Srivilliputtur Assembly constituency & Tenkasi Lok Sabha constituency, Virudhunagar District in the Indian State of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: W. Pudupatti
topPlaces.description: W.Pudupatti is a panchayat town in Virudhunagar district, Tamil Nadu. It is under Srivilliputtur Assembly constituency and Tenkasi LokSabha constituency.

topPlaces.name: South Kodikulam
topPlaces.description: South Kodikulam is a panchayat town in Virudhunagar district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Grizzled Squirrel Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Grizzled Squirrel Wildlife Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Grizzled Squirrel Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (65 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (72 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Grizzled Squirrel Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Grizzled Squirrel Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Grizzled Squirrel Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Grizzled Squirrel Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Grizzled Squirrel Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Edaganathar temple, Kansapuram, Koomapatti, Mamsapuram, W. Pudupatti.
